title: Post-Generation Boundary Review
goal: Implement #370 by producing a compact factual review of generated vs hand-authored CLI authority after the generated-adapter and lifecycle-readiness lanes.
non_goals: Close #230 without the separate #375 closure review.
Reopen completed lanes without evidence of drift.

intent.outcome: A reviewer can see which command surfaces are generated, which remain hand-authored authority, which lifecycle surfaces are admitted or deferred, and what simplification target should come next.
intent.constraints: Review artifact only; no behavior changes.
intent.latitude: Use existing contracts and current source inspection to make the review compact and evidence-backed.

execution.next_step: Archive this slice and continue with #371.
execution.proof: Run planning surface checks, reconcile, and summary.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Verify post-generation CLI and lifecycle authority boundaries.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: No implementation in this review slice.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: The concise review shape and next simplification target.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: The review reveals generated adapter drift or unsafe lifecycle eligibility.

completion_criteria: Generated vs hand-authored CLI surfaces are listed.
Remaining direct executable-code authority is named.
One next simplification target is selected.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Post-generation CLI and lifecycle authority boundary review recorded.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: Pending final planning checks before archive.
execution_summary.knowledge promoted (Memory/Docs/Config): No Memory/config promotion; review artifact is historical evidence.

proof_report.validation proof: uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; uv run agentic-workspace reconcile --format json; uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json.
proof_report.proof achieved now: The review lists generated surfaces, remaining hand-authored authority, lifecycle eligibility, runtime primitive ownership, and next simplification target.

intent_satisfaction.original intent: Verify post-generation CLI and lifecycle authority boundaries.
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: #370 slice satisfied: review artifact lists generated surfaces, hand-authored authority, lifecycle eligibility, runtime primitive ownership, and selected #371 as next target.

closure_check.why this decision is honest: #370 is complete, but parent #230 and follow-up children remain open.
closure_check.reopen trigger: Reopen #370 if generated adapter or lifecycle authority boundaries are found to be misstated.

discard.summary: Raw inspection detail is superseded by the compact review artifact.

memory.summary: No Memory/config promotion; review artifact is historical evidence.

config_check.summary: No Memory/config promotion; review artifact is historical evidence.
